questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank No. 5.
Which statement is NOT true according to the passage?

options.text: More than a million Ethiopian people were displaced last year due to civil war.
There are 82.4 million displaced persons in the world.
Turkey is presently hosting 3.7 million displaced people within its borders.
1.7 million people from Syria have been displaced till now due to war and armed conflict.

questions.correct_option_text: 1.7 million people from Syria have been displaced till now due to war and armed conflict.
